_pairingUnconfirmed: The vizPubkey<->operator pairing below is PROVISIONAL: vizPubkeys are listed in on-chain key_auths order (gram.gate active set), which need NOT match the op-1/2/3 order baked into the TON multisig signer array. tonPubkey holds each operator's mainnet v4/v5r1 WALLET ADDRESS (the public TON identity we have), not an ed25519 hex pubkey. Neither field is read on the sign/approve runtime path (the coordinator keys off operator id); both are used only by the rotation tooling. Confirm the true VIZ<->operator pairing with the operators and supply real ed25519 tonPubkeys BEFORE relying on this manifest for a rotation.
